result: If I could change the world in one way, I would make empathy and understanding more instinctive for everyone. Imagine if every person could naturally see things from others’ perspectives—across cultures, beliefs, and backgrounds. It wouldn’t erase all disagreements or challenges, but it could reduce conflict, inspire cooperation, and help us solve problems together with greater compassion. The ripple effects—more kindness, more justice, more innovation—could be world-changing.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
